headline: Is Amgen (AMGN) Pricing Reflect Its Recent 24% One Year Share Price Return
summary: If you are wondering whether Amgen's current share price lines up with its underlying worth, this breakdown will help you separate the headline moves from the underlying value story. Amgen shares last closed at US$379.27, with returns of 10.0% over the past 30 days and 23.6% over the past year, while the 7 day return of a 1.3% decline shows that shorter term sentiment can still shift quickly. Recent attention on Amgen has been shaped by ongoing discussion around its pipeline and broader...
